picks.quote: I got Kus as my dog of the week, but I nailed him at plus 275. He's down to plus 155.
This is the one I'm playing. Gomez Jr. by knockout here, guys. I'll tell you. So, this is my knockout prop of the week.

I definitely don't see Brian losing. So, it just I'm probably not playing that fight unless...
